main.subtitle: Take control of your financial life with our comprehensive suite of tools designed for simplicity and power. Track, save, and grow your wealth.
main.featuresTitle: Everything you need to master your money
main.featuresSubtitle: Balio provides a complete 360-degree view of your financial health with intuitive tools.
main.feat1Desc: Automatically categorize expenses and visualize your spending habits over time.
main.feat2Desc: Keep track of all your accounts (cash, bank...) and check your balance in real time.
main.feat3Desc: Set financial objectives and track your progress to reach them ahead of schedule.
main.feat4Desc: Visualize your wealth growth and discover trends with interactive charts.
main.ctaSubtitle: Join others who are mastering their money with Balio today.

landing.heroSub: Track, analyze and optimize your money from one place. Accounts, transactions, budgets and goals — all connected.
landing.featuresSub: Balio brings together the essential tools for managing your personal finances effectively.

analysis.label: Analytics
analysis.title: Visualize your financial habits
analysis.desc: Interactive charts of income and expenses by category, month by month. Detect trends and make better decisions with real data.

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.title: All your accounts in one place
accounts.desc: Manage cash, banks and more from a single panel. Check your consolidated total balance and follow every movement in real time.

transactions.label: Transactions
transactions.title: Track every movement
transactions.desc: Add income and expenses with custom categories and icons. Filter, search and understand exactly where your money goes each month.

goals.label: Goals
goals.title: Chase your savings goals
goals.desc: Set financial goals and track your progress visually. From a trip to an emergency fund, every active goal at a glance.

budgets.label: Budgets
budgets.title: Spend with intention and control
budgets.desc: Set spending limits by category and see how much you have left. Visual alerts when you approach the limit.

landing.aboutDesc: Balio was created as a final degree project to build a complete, secure and modern personal finance app. Every module is designed so anyone can understand and control their money.
landing.ctaSub: Join and start understanding your finances in minutes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your details to access your dashboard.
auth.passwordRequirements: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase and 1 number

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must have at least 8 characters
errors.passwordPattern: Password must include uppercase, lowercase and a number

hero.title: A final degree project on personal finance with a practical, technical and realistic approach.
hero.description: Balio was developed as a final degree project by Marcos Romay Fernandez to provide a simple yet powerful personal finance management tool, with account tracking, transactions, categories, savings goals and visual analysis.

project.lead: This project was developed as a final degree project by Marcos Romay Fernandez.
project.body: Balio was created to offer a simple yet powerful tool for personal finance management, allowing users to keep a clear view of their income, expenses and savings goals.

technical.paragraph1: The application combines a modern visual layer with a robust backend focused on financial data management, secure authentication and consistent persistence.
technical.paragraph2: Its design seeks a balance between clarity for end users and enough structure to grow in areas such as filters, goals, budgets and statistics.

origin.title: Origin of the idea
origin.paragraph1: Throughout my life I developed the habit of saving small amounts of money from family gifts or occasional tasks. Over time, as I started taking on more personal expenses, I began working in hospitality to maintain some financial independence.
origin.paragraph2: This meant I had more money both in cash and in bank accounts, which created the need for more accurate control over income and expenses.
origin.paragraph3: I tried several financial management applications, but none of them fully matched the features I considered necessary. Most offered only a basic income and expense log, while lacking other capabilities that I believe are important for more detailed control and effective financial planning.

objective.title: Application objective
objective.paragraph1: The objective of this final degree project is to design and develop a personal finance management application that fills those gaps and provides a more complete experience.
objective.paragraph2: Its main functionality is the recording of income and expenses, which can be associated with different accounts: user-linked bank accounts and manual accounts such as cash.
objective.paragraph3: Each transaction can be assigned to a category, making it possible to generate clear and useful statistics to better understand a person's financial situation.

features.title: Main features
features.description: The application includes the key building blocks needed to register movements, organize accounts and turn financial data into useful information for decision-making.

transactions.title: Transaction tracking
transactions.description: Allows income and expenses to be recorded quickly, clearly and in an organized way.

accounts.title: Account management
accounts.description: Supports working with multiple accounts, both bank-based and manual.

categories.title: Custom categories
categories.description: Help classify expenses and better analyze financial behavior.

budgets.title: Budgets and statistics
budgets.description: Support future planning and provide clear views of income, expenses and amounts.

goals.title: Savings goals
goals.description: Allow users to define specific goals and track their progress over time.

usefulness.title: Approach and usefulness
usefulness.description: Thanks to its level of customization, the application can also adapt to small businesses or personal projects, offering a simple, effective financial management system designed for day-to-day control.

stack.title: The Tech Stack
stack.subtitle: Every layer carefully chosen for reliability and developer experience.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.subtitle: A clean three-tier design — decoupled, typed and secure end to end.

author.name: Marcos Romay Fernández
author.description: Balio was built as a final degree project combining a real-world personal finance use case with modern full-stack development practices.

cta.title: Want to see it in action?
cta.description: Explore the full app or connect with the author on LinkedIn or GitHub.
